title: Icyclo
description: A datapack that adds fully functional Icicles which you can find in cold biomes across the world.
body:
## Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-1tH2XAlZ8g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## About the Datapack
**Icyclo** is a Minecraft datapack that adds Icicles, which you can find generating in Caves, on Trees and in Structures in cold biomes across your world. Gather some with a Silk Touch Pickaxe and use them to get Powdered Snow, Ice* or just for decoration!

You can find the full list of features this datapack introduces in the changelog tab.

**Icyclo** is available in 19 languages:
- English (US, UK and even Upside Down!)
- Spanish (Spain and Mexico)
- Portuguese (Portugal and Brazil)
- Russian
- French
- German
- Italian
- Polish
- Ukrainian
- Chinese (Traditional and Simplified)
- Korean
- Hindi
- Arabic
- Swedish

_*Requires the ["The Grinding Table"](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-grinding-table) datapack._

# FAQ

**Q:** How can I disable the "Loaded succesfully!" message?
> **A:** Add the [No HFD Load Popups](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-hfd-popups) datapack to your datapack/mod folder.


**Q:** The pack doesn't work! / I don't see the "datapack loaded succesfully!" message!
> **A:** You're on a Minecraft version that doesn't support the pack. Check the [versions tab](https://modrinth.com/project/icyclo/versions) for compatible Minecraft versions.

**Q:** The Icicles work, but have missing textures!
> **A:** You don't have the resourcepack installed. You can find it in the [versions tab](https://modrinth.com/project/icyclo/versions).

**Q:** Does this datapack cause a lot of lag?
> **A:** Most of the time, none at all! Icyclo has gone through many, MANY stages of optimization, and has been performance tested on high-end PCs, low-end PCs and Aternos servers with very good results. The only exception is having lots of Icicles loaded in one area (~75 Icicles and up), and to that I can only suggest lowering your simulation distance.

**Q:** Is this datapack compatible with other datapacks that add custom blocks?
> **A:** Yep!

# Additional Info

This datapack has a Debug Mode that gives all Icicles the Glowing effect and prints debug info to chat. If for any reason you want to enable it, you can run the command:

```
/function icyclo:debug
```


Using this pack in a video or modpack is fine as long as proper credit is given.

If you wish to contact me you can do so via Gmail (happyfiedyt@gmail.com), Discord (@happyfied), or the [happyfied Modrinth Feedback Form](https://forms.gle/WRtN3YQVyJuZWpuN7).

Bugs wanted.
